title: Sound Hopscotch
description: A rapid sound-to-letter game where kids hear a consonant sound and tap the matching hopscotch letter stone.
learningGoals: Map spoken consonant sounds to printed letters
Practice tricky contrasts such as b/d, m/n, and c/g
interactionModel: choose-one tap a letter stone after a spoken sound prompt
feedbackModel: Correct stones sparkle and speak praise; misses wiggle gently, get a spoken nudge, and replay the sound prompt.

modes.title: Hop to the Sound
modes.skill: sound-letter mapping for b, m, s, t, c, p, d, and g

modes.title: Quick Hops
modes.skill: rapid discrimination of tricky letter-sound pairs

credits: Shared QLOBE Kids letter-tile art; emoji placeholder kangaroo art. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
